query.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels,'k8s.cluster.name') FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='system.cpu.load_average.1m' AND JSONExtractString(labels,'k8s.cluster.name')!='' ORDER BY 1

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, avg(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, avg(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='k8s.node.cpu.usage' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='k8s.node.cpu.usage' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, avg(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, avg(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='k8s.node.allocatable_cpu' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='k8s.node.allocatable_cpu' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, avg(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='k8s.node.memory.usage' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='k8s.node.memory.usage' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, avg(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='k8s.node.allocatable_memory' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='k8s.node.allocatable_memory' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT b.time AS time, b.state AS state, b.a / t.total AS value FROM (SELECT time, state, sum(r) AS a FROM (SELECT time, fp, state, cluster, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'state') AS state, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='system.cpu.time' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='system.cpu.time' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, state, cluster)) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, state) b INNER JOIN (SELECT time, sum(r) AS total FROM (SELECT time, fp, cluster, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='system.cpu.time' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='system.cpu.time' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster)) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time) t ON b.time=t.time WHERE t.total > 0 ORDER BY time

SELECT time, state, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'state') AS state, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, avg(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='system.memory.usage' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='system.memory.usage' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, state, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, state ORDER BY time

SELECT time, namespace, avg(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.namespace.name') AS namespace, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, avg(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='k8s.pod.cpu.usage' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='k8s.pod.cpu.usage' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, namespace, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, namespace ORDER BY time

SELECT time, namespace, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.namespace.name') AS namespace, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, avg(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='k8s.pod.memory.usage' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='k8s.pod.memory.usage' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, namespace, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, namespace ORDER BY time

SELECT time, pod, avg(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.pod.name') AS pod, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, avg(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='k8s.pod.cpu.usage' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='k8s.pod.cpu.usage' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, pod, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, pod ORDER BY time

SELECT time, pod, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.pod.name') AS pod, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, avg(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='k8s.pod.memory.usage' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='k8s.pod.memory.usage' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, pod, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, pod ORDER BY time

SELECT time, '1m' AS series, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, avg(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='system.cpu.load_average.1m' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='system.cpu.load_average.1m' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, '5m' AS series, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, avg(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='system.cpu.load_average.5m' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='system.cpu.load_average.5m' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, '15m' AS series, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, avg(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='system.cpu.load_average.15m' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='system.cpu.load_average.15m' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, concat(device,'::',direction) AS series, sum(r) AS value FROM (SELECT time, fp, device, direction, cluster, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'device') AS device, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'direction') AS direction, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='system.network.io' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='system.network.io' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, device, direction, cluster)) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, device, direction HAVING value > 0 ORDER BY time

SELECT time, concat(device,'::',direction) AS series, sum(r) AS value FROM (SELECT time, fp, device, direction, cluster, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'device') AS device, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'direction') AS direction, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='system.network.packets' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='system.network.packets' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, device, direction, cluster)) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, device, direction ORDER BY time

SELECT time, concat(device,'::',direction) AS series, sum(r) AS value FROM (SELECT time, fp, device, direction, cluster, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'device') AS device, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'direction') AS direction, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='system.network.errors' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='system.network.errors' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, device, direction, cluster)) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, device, direction ORDER BY time

SELECT time, concat(device,'::',direction) AS series, sum(r) AS value FROM (SELECT time, fp, device, direction, cluster, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'device') AS device, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'direction') AS direction, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='system.network.dropped' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='system.network.dropped' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, device, direction, cluster)) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, device, direction ORDER BY time

SELECT time, concat(protocol,'::',state) AS series, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'protocol') AS protocol, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'state') AS state, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, avg(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='system.network.connections' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='system.network.connections' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, protocol, state, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, protocol, state ORDER BY time

SELECT time, concat(device,'::',direction) AS series, sum(r) AS value FROM (SELECT time, fp, device, direction, cluster, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'device') AS device, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'direction') AS direction, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='system.disk.io' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='system.disk.io' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, device, direction, cluster)) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, device, direction HAVING value > 0 ORDER BY time

SELECT time, concat(device,'::',direction) AS series, sum(r) AS value FROM (SELECT time, fp, device, direction, cluster, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'device') AS device, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'direction') AS direction, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='system.disk.operations' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='system.disk.operations' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, device, direction, cluster)) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, device, direction HAVING value > 0 ORDER BY time

SELECT time, concat(device,'::',direction) AS series, sum(r) AS value FROM (SELECT time, fp, device, direction, cluster, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'device') AS device, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'direction') AS direction, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='system.disk.operation_time' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='system.disk.operation_time' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, device, direction, cluster)) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, device, direction HAVING value > 0 ORDER BY time

panels.title: Queue size
panels.description: The queue size of pending I/O operations.

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, device, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'device') AS device, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='system.disk.pending_operations' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='system.disk.pending_operations' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, device, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, device HAVING value > 0 ORDER BY time

SELECT device, mountpoint, state, type, mode, sum(r) AS usage FROM (SELECT fp, device, mountpoint, state, type, mode, cluster, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'device') AS device, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'mountpoint') AS mountpoint, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'state') AS state, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'type') AS type, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'mode') AS mode, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='system.filesystem.usage' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='system.filesystem.usage' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, device, mountpoint, state, type, mode, cluster)) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY device, mountpoint, state, type, mode ORDER BY usage DESC LIMIT 30

SELECT device, mountpoint, state, type, mode, sum(v) AS usage FROM (SELECT s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'device') AS device, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'mountpoint') AS mountpoint, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'state') AS state, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'type') AS type, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'mode') AS mode, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, avg(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='system.filesystem.inodes.usage' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='system.filesystem.inodes.usage' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY fp, device, mountpoint, state, type, mode, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY device, mountpoint, state, type, mode ORDER BY usage DESC LIMIT 30
